chapter_title: Admin. Suspension of Driver's License for Failure to Pass Test for Intoxication
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 524. Admin. Suspension of Driver's License for Failure to Pass Test for Intoxication
##### § 524.014 — Notice of Suspension

A notice of suspension under Section 524.013 (Notice of Department’s Determination) must state:

    (1) the reason and statutory grounds for the suspension;

    (2) the effective date of the suspension;

    (3) the right of the person to a hearing;

    (4) how to request a hearing; and

    (5) the period in which the person must request a hearing.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: A notice of suspension under Section 524.013 (Notice of Department’s Determination) must state:
